title: Intensely Smoky Peruvian Lamb Seco De Cordero
description: A hearty Peruvian lamb dish with a rich smoky flavor, perfect for a post-workout meal, featuring condensed milk and smoked to perfection in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: Preheat the smoker to 225 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together smoked paprika, garlic, salt, black pepper, and dried oregano.
Rub the spice mixture all over the lamb shoulder, making sure to coat it evenly.
Place the lamb shoulder in the bamboo steamer, leaving enough space for the steam to circulate.
In a small bowl, whisk together condensed milk and apple cider vinegar.
Pour the milk mixture over the lamb shoulder, making sure it is fully coated.
Add the bamboo steamer liquid to the steamer, making sure the water level is below the bottom of the lamb.
Smoke the lamb for 4 hours, or until it is tender and falls apart easily.
Remove the lamb from the steamer and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
